title: Implement User Registration API
description: Create the SQLAlchemy user model, Pydantic schema, and FastAPI endpoint to allow new users to register. This includes hashing the password before storing it.
ai_instructions: You are a software engineer following TDD. Write a failing test for the API endpoint first, then implement the logic to make it pass. Use SQLAlchemy for the model, Pydantic for schema validation, and Passlib for hashing.
execution_steps: Create a `backend/tests` directory and configure pytest.
Create test file `backend/tests/test_auth.py` with a failing test for the POST /users/ endpoint.
Create `backend/app/schemas.py` with Pydantic models for User input and output.
Create `backend/app/models.py` with the SQLAlchemy User model.
Create `backend/app/database.py` to handle database session management.
Create `backend/app/hashing.py` for password hashing logic using Passlib.
Create `backend/app/crud.py` with a function to create a user in the database.
Implement the logic to make the test pass.
Run `pytest` from the `backend` directory to verify.
Add `@trace TASK-007` annotations to all new/modified files.
definition_of_done: API endpoint 'POST /users/' is created and functional.
User data is correctly saved to the 'users' table.
Passwords are securely hashed using bcrypt.
All pytest tests for the registration feature pass.
All modified source files have '@trace TASK-007' annotation.
